event.description:
You may be scared of scalaz, but it's changing. Scalaz Streams is a way to combine streams and processes in a light-weight mode.

Dick Wall is a founder of Scala Bay.

Location: Box

Schedule:

• 6:30-7:00 - networking

• 7:00-7:10 - announcements etc

• 7:10-~8:40 - talk

• 8:40-9:00 - networking
event.title: ScalaZ Streams and the Real World
